title: Blackrock Chukka Work Boots, Safety Boots, Safety Shoes, Steel Toe Cap, Mens Womens Ladies, Work Shoes, Black, Gardening, Lightweight, Leather, Wide Fit, Non Slip, On Site - Size 8
features: BUILT TO WORK: Steel toe cap protects against impact from falling objects and against compression, giving 200 Joules of protection - equivalent to dropping 20kg from a height of 1m or a weight of 1.5 tonnes resting on the toe area

PROTECTION FROM BELOW: Steel midsole - a thin yet strong steel plate that runs the length of the sole and protects against objects penetrating from below and piercing your foot, such as nails, tacks, glass shards and more, that could otherwise cause a potentially serious injury
DURABILITY: Dual density PU/PU sole that is resistant to fuel oil, so it won't degrade, stain or retain grease that would otherwise cause slips and trips
SAFETY FEATURES: Other features include energy absorbing heel that reduces foot fatigue; anti-static sole that minimises the build-up of electrostatic charges; slip resistant sole

SIZING: Blackrock safety footwear is designed with a wide fitting to allow for thick boot socks to be worn. Please take this into account when choosing your size; you may wish to move down one UK/EUR size if wearing with regular socks
description: From the manufacturer Blackrock is a leading UK-based brand specialising in certified safety footwear, hi-vis clothing, head-to-toe PPE and hand protection. With over 20 years’ experience, we’re committed to delivering high-quality products that meet and exceed the demands of modern workplaces. Blackrock Steel Safety Footwear Built for professionals who need maximum protection and rugged durability, Blackrock Steel Footwear delivers proven strength and long-lasting comfort. Designed to keep your feet safe and supported in the toughest working conditions. What is Steel Footwear? These boots feature a steel safety toe that provides exceptional impact and compression resistance, offering dependable protection against heavy objects and harsh environments. The traditional steel construction ensures uncompromising strength where it matters most. Where They’re Used: Ideal for demanding industries such as construction, heavy engineering, manufacturing, and logistics, Blackrock Steel Footwear is the trusted choice for workers who need superior protection and all-day comfort on the job. Blackrock Chukka Boot Blackrock's best-selling work boot. The Chukka safety boot is a classic style that is used in a wide and varied range of industries. Featuring a leather upper with padded ankle support, it has both steel toe cap and midsole protection plus a hardwearing, dual density PU sole that is shock absorbent, anti-slip, anti-static and fuel oil resistant. UKCA/CE Certified Conforms to the following European/UK standard: EN ISO 20345:2011 SBP SRC KEY PRODUCT FEATURES - Images shown are for illustration purposes only. Actual product style may vary. Safety Toe Cap Steel protection that shields toes from impact and compression. Protective Midsole Sturdy steel barrier that protects against sharp objects underfoot. Slip Resistant Sole Unit Specially engineered tread pattern that provides superior traction on wet, oily, or uneven surfaces reducing slips and trips.
